codeReview.summary: Feature successfully completed final cutover validation. The implementation is minimal and correct: updated a `.gitignore` comment from 'cagent' to 'cogent' and regenerated `docs/ATLAS.md` with the current timestamp. All required validators passed: cargo check/test/clippy, nix flake check, Linux package derivation proof, repo bootstrap dry run, runtime commands, and stale-reference sweeps. The cutover is fully green and acceptance-ready.

summary:
PASS: This validation feature correctly finalized the cutover by regenerating ATLAS and running the comprehensive acceptance suite. The commit contains only the expected minimal changes: a .gitignore comment update and ATLAS timestamp refresh. All verification steps passed:

✅ ATLAS regeneration (88 docs scanned)
✅ Cargo validators (check, test 214 passed, clippy)
✅ Nix flake check
✅ Linux x86_64 package derivation proof (accepted fallback method)
✅ Repo bootstrap dry run
✅ Runtime cogent work list/ready commands
✅ Stale-reference sweep (no matches)

The worker correctly handled the pre-existing generated.ts file by stashing it to keep the feature commit scoped. All three fulfills assertions (VAL-DOCS-003, VAL-RUNTIME-009, VAL-CROSS-004) are validated. The mission is fully green and acceptance-ready.
